60553.title: The Situation Room with Wolf Blitzer
60553.description: Anchor Wolf Blitzer invites CNN correspondents, analysts and guests for timely coverage of the day's news events. Patterned after the concept of the White House Situation Room, the Monday-Saturday show is a discussion forum often with opposing sides debating current national affairs.

60554.title: Erin Burnett OutFront
60554.description: It's Erin Burnett's turn to step out front and try to maintain a viable viewer presence for CNN in the weekday news arena. But the former CNBC anchor won't worry about ratings for her hourlong general news program, comparing that burden to "death." Instead, she'll concern herself with translating world events into relevant information for viewers, paying close attention to such topics as the Middle East and women's issues. "I want people to say that our show is smart. I want our show to be authentic", Burnett says in a promo. "I want our show to have courage". Left unsaid, of course, is that she wants her show to have a big audience, too.

60555.title: Anderson Cooper 360
60555.description: Cooper brings his prickly but often witty perspective to current events and personalities in the news. He is joined by a series of guests that frequently include political and legal analysts.

60556.title: Cuomo Prime Time
60556.description: After airing several different programs in this time slot in recent years, CNN attempts to solidify its prime-time schedule by moving Chris Cuomo to the toughest hour in cable news. Cuomo, the former co-anchor of CNN's morning show `New Day', eschews panel discussions in favour of in-depth one-on-one interviews that test politicians and newsmakers on their positions. He also analyses the news of the day and presents breaking news. Described by one publication as "America's toughest news anchor", Cuomo wants his show to be known as one that holds civil debates. "The need is clear", he says. "Hopefully we help fill it".

60557.title: Don Lemon Tonight
60557.description: Don Lemon presents the biggest stories, newsmakers, and spirited conversations of the day.

60558.title: CNN Newsroom with John Vause
60558.description: Live from Atlanta, John Vause brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world, followed by the latest sporting news.

60559.title: World Sport
60559.description: Highlights and action from the world's sporting competitions.

60560.title: CNN Newsroom with John Vause
60560.description: Live from Atlanta, John Vause brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world, followed by the latest sporting news.

60561.title: CNN Newsroom with Robyn Curnow
60561.description: Live from Atlanta, Robyn Curnow presents the latest news and global events.

60564.title: Early Start
60564.description: An early start with news from Ashleigh Banfield and Zoraida Sambolin.

60566.title: World Sport
60566.description: Highlights and action from the world's sporting competitions.

60567.title: First Move with Julia Chatterley
60567.description: A look at the big stories developing as the US markets open, anchored from the floor of the NYSE.

60568.title: Connect the World
60568.description: Taking the viewers on a journey across the continents.

60569.title: World Sport
60569.description: Highlights and action from the world's sporting competitions.

60570.title: Connect the World
60570.description: Taking the viewers on a journey across the continents.

60572.title: African Voices Changemakers
60572.description: An exploration of the changemakers in Africa who are coming up with innovative ways to have a positive impact on their communities.

60573.title: Amanpour
60573.description: Peabody Award-winning journalist Christiane Amanpour, CNN's chief international correspondent, hosts this half-hour weeknight interview program, with each episode focusing on a newsworthy topic and featuring guests, from global leaders to heads of state and cultural icons, who are comfortable challenging conventional wisdom.

60574.title: Hala Gorani Tonight
60574.description: Hala Gorani breaks down the day's news, curating the stories that matter and getting into exactly why they are important.

60576.title: Quest Means Business
60576.description: Richard Quest and a team of correspondents analyze the facts and figures from the business world to help people earn money and spend it wisely.

60577.title: Living Golf
60577.description: Previewing the Olympic golf competition with a look at the history of golf in the Olympic Games. Plus, a look at Japan's unique golfing culture.

60578.title: The Lead with Jake Tapper
60578.description: CNN's chief Washington correspondent, Jake Tapper, hosts this hour-long weekday afternoon program, which covers all the day's top stories from around the country and the world, headlines that span politics, money, sports and popular culture. `The Lead' works to ensure that viewers are caught up on the stories that matter, often highlighting news that may have been overlooked. Prior to joining CNN, Tapper served as senior White House correspondent at ABC News.
